parties.name: GLASSER, HENRY 353 SACRAMENTO STREET #1120 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111

calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Securities Account Held In The Name Of Decedent Is Trust Property
Off Calendar Dec-28-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Glasser, Esq. present in pro per.
Mr. Glasser stated his reasons for filing of the petition because Ms. Jacobson was his clients for over 40 years and it was his understanding that it was her intention to have all securities to be in Trust name, and did not discovered until her death.
After hearing the arguments and considering of the petition and supporting declaration, the Petition is denied, the court will revised the Order submitted by Mr. Glasser.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne
